---
title: "Current Songs on Repeat"
format: html
page-layout: full
listing:
  contents: music_data.yml
  type: table
  fields: [title, artist]
  field-links: []
  field-display-names:
    title: "Track"
    artist: "Artist"
---

<style>
/* Force the table to take up the full page width */
.listing-table {
  width: 100% !important;
  table-layout: auto !important;
}

/* Allow text to wrap nicely onto a new line if it is long */
.listing-table th, 
.listing-table td {
  white-space: normal !important; 
  word-wrap: break-word !important;
}

/* Give the song title column more breathing room */
.listing-table td.listing-title {
  width: 60% !important;
}

/* Give the artist column the remaining space */
.listing-table td.listing-artist {
  width: 40% !important;
}
</style>
